events.label: Launch
events.note: Launch occurred on April 1, 2026 at 22:35:12 UTC from LC-39B.

events.label: Horizons trajectory coverage begins
events.note: JPL Horizons vector coverage begins at 2026-04-02T01:59:00Z, shortly after Orion/ICPS separation.

events.label: Closest approach
events.note: Horizons lists closest approach at 2026-04-06T23:01:00Z, 8,282 km from the Moon's center.

events.label: Maximum distance from Earth
events.note: Horizons lists maximum distance at 2026-04-06T23:05:00Z, 413,146.2 km from Earth's center.

notes: Flight path sampled from JPL Horizons Earth-centered vector ephemeris for target -1024. Horizons coverage begins at 2026-04-02T01:59:00Z, so the first 3 hours 23 minutes 48 seconds of the mission remain outside the sampled trajectory.
